End-of-Day Debrief (Sun, Apr 26, 2026)
Newsletter launch day for roast.nik.co + vms.nik.co. — Both shipped with brand-consistent OG images, full meta tags, analytics dashboar
Roast live performance (as of 19:33 ET snapshot): — ~423 impressions, 13 form starts, 5 checkout opens, 17 Stripe sessions, 10 paid
Model upgrade locked: — Opus 4.7 wins for landing page roasts. ~$0.35-0.55/roast, ~$3.50 net margin per
tribe.nik.co Phase 0 deployed — at tribe.nik.co (passcode 7586). Wireframe shell only. Direction pivoted twice t
Vercel env quote bug — (30+ min wasted): `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` and `ANTHROPIC_MODEL` had literal quote ch
Status-page cron near-miss — (00:08 ET): `git add -A` on stale `/tmp` clone almost wiped 21 deployed assets.
Analytics dashboard cache bypass — (security hole, fixed): Vercel was serving prerendered analytics page from cache
Mobile QA miss on tribe.nik.co — shipped without testing 390px viewport. Caught by Nik. Fixed with responsive CSS
Stuck-roast alert spam — QA slug `halfdays-com-7b6naj` re-fired alerts every 5 min. Cleaned slug + added
Narration discipline regressed. — Multiple violations of the silent-tool-calls rule today. Doubled-down rule reaff
Mobile QA forgotten. — Shipped tribe.nik.co without testing 390px. New rule: every public-facing UI mus
